channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Amazon to end support for older Kindles, prompting user outcry - BBC
item.description:
1. Amazon to end support for older Kindles, prompting user outcry  BBC

  3. Got a Kindle From Before 2013? Amazon Is Pulling Support  PCMag
  4. Amazon thanks loyal Kindle devotees by bricking their kit  theregister.com
  5. RIP to the original Kindle Paperwhite. Amazon is ending support for older ereaders.  Business Insider

item.title: Apple MacBooks slow down after 49 days due to "macOS time bomb" - Notebookcheck
item.description:
1. Apple MacBooks slow down after 49 days due to "macOS time bomb"  Notebookcheck
  2. Unless you reboot every once in a while, your Mac will get kicked offline every 49 days  AppleInsider
  3. Apple MacBooks Lose Network Connectivity After 49.7 Days Due to macOS "Time Bomb" Bug  TechPowerUp
  4. macOS has a 49.7-day networking time bomb built in that only a reboot fixes — comparison operation on unreliable time value stops machines dead in their tracks  Tom's Hardware
  5. It Only Takes Roughly Two Months for an Apple MacBook to Lose Network Connectivity Thanks to a Newly Discovered “Time Bomb” Bug  The FPS Review
